programme.title: The Christmas Shepherd
programme.desc: Sally is heartbroken when her dog runs away during a thunderstorm. When she learns he was found by Mark, a widower, she travels to Boston to get him. Sally and Mark are given the best Christmas gifts of their lives when they fall in love.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: Caroline reluctantly leaves the children with a baby sitter when Charles invites her on a 6-day trip to Mankato.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie

programme.title: Duke
programme.desc: Marine Sergeant Terry Pulaski returns from fighting in Afghanistan with scars that are both mental and physical. Feeling like a burden to his family, Terry takes off with his Border collie, Duke, to begin a life on the streets. But years later, when his faithful pet falls ill, he's forced to reach out for help and also bring himself to reconnect with the daughter he has long since left behind.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Dater's Handbook
programme.desc: After reading a book about dating and changing her personality to find a lover, a woman realizes the man she wants is right in front of her.

programme.title: Love Unleashed
programme.desc: While hosting a puppy party, a woman tries to convince an uptight executive to give in to his daughter's pleas to adopt a rescue dog.

programme.title: My Favorite Wedding
programme.desc: Tess lasers through her best friend's wedding planning like the star doctor she hopes to become. After meeting the groom's best man, Tess maneuvers around him like a gurney in the emergency room, until she learns that he has a few moves of his own.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: When two guests arrive at Grey House and are immediately at odds, Cassie uses her magic to bring them together; Sam tries to plan the perfect date for Cassie, but various nuisances keep getting in the way.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: When a visiting chef is unable to relax, Cassie arranges for her to spend a whole day at the stove stirring a special recipe to quiet her mind; Grace is presented with the Merriwick Wish Book for her birthday and encouraged to make an entry.

programme.title: The Convenient Groom
programme.desc: When a celebrity marriage counselor (Vanessa Marcil) is left high and dry at the altar, her contractor steps in as the groom to help her save face.

programme.title: All Summer Long
programme.desc: Tia's dream job of captaining a dining cruise hits rough water when her ex is hired as the restaurant's chef.

programme.title: The Russell Girl
programme.desc: A woman (Amber Tamblyn) tries to make amends with a neighbor (Jennifer Ehle) who lives across the street from her family.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Ultimate Gift
programme.desc: Jason Stevens (Drew Fuller) lives a life of wealth and privilege. When his grandfather (James Garner) dies, Jason expects to receive a hefty inheritance. Instead, however, Jason must set out on a journey of self-discovery to earn the true gift his grandfather meant for him to have. Along the way, Jason befriends a dying girl (Abigail Breslin) and her mother (Ali Hillis) and learns what is really important in life.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Ultimate Life
programme.desc: Despite his best intentions, a billionaire has trouble making his beloved girlfriend a priority. He reads his grandfather's journal in the hope that it will provide guidance on how to live his life.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Ultimate Legacy
programme.desc: Jason Stevens continues his journey while helping a friend walk a similar path.
